This classification places Stroganowia bupleuroides within the larger group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. Further classification indicates that Stroganowia bupleuroides is a member of the genus Stroganowia, which is a group of plants that are closely related to the genus Bupleurum. The plant's classification also suggests a close relationship with other plants in the order Apiales, which includes many species of carrots, parsley, and related plants. Overall, the classification of Stroganowia bupleuroides highlights its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Apiaceae family.
